---
title: "About"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://dub.sh/gitb
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://dub.sh/gsch
    - icon: git
      text: HuggingFace
      href: https://dub.sh/hfco
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://dub.sh/8ttNCHg
---

I love to build. That's how I operate.

These days, working on: coding agent harnesses, RL/inference infra, and benchmarking evals (especially for long horizon code).

Concentrating intensely on the right problems, remaining open to fresh perspectives.

Founders: I also participate in angel rounds. No warm intro needed, decision in 15 min, your terms.
